message:
fix(policy): fix credential broker integration test compilation errors

Fix 10+ compilation errors in policy.rs credential broker integration tests:
- Add missing PolicyInput fields (pane_title, pane_cwd, agent_type)
- Replace PolicySurface::Cli (nonexistent) with PolicySurface::Robot
- Fix ComplianceSnapshot field access (total_evaluations → counters.total_evaluations)
- Fix snapshot() call to use compliance_engine_mut() with required now_ms arg
- Use Human actor for authorized-action test (Robot hits destructive-action gate)

All 58 credential broker tests now pass (41 unit + 17 policy integration).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
